# Standard Delivery

Standard delivery is available for orders within the continental United States, offering free shipping on purchases exceeding fifty dollars. For orders below this amount, a flat shipping fee of four dollars applies. It's important to note that processing for orders does not occur on weekends; thus, any order placed on a Friday afternoon will start processing the following Monday.

[Source: shipping_options.md#standard-delivery]
